title: manual entry for another employee
excerpt: Would it be possible to enter manual time entries for other employees if you are an admin? I have time entries in another column that I would like to re-enter in the time tracker but they have to be manualy transfered by…

posts.author: TouriScope (Guillaume Thibeault)
posts.cookedHtml: Would it be possible to enter manual time entries for other employees if you are an admin? I have time entries in another column that I would like to re-enter in the time tracker but they have to be manualy transfered by the employee and cannot be added manualy by the admin to save a bit of time. It would be nice to be able to add time tracking entries by selecting the time and date and then the employee.

posts.author: MistyMK (AppBay)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @TouriScope there is a new app called Smart Timer and Team Tracking with the same look an feel as the native time tracker but additional features.

Staff can update time duration (not needing to add start and finish times) and you can export a report to excel etc. Or view the report on a board.

Hope that’s helpful!
